name: The Brandts (no relation, they say)

statedReqs.notes: Burned by an agent before. Fact-check everything. Everything.

hiddenPrefs.desc: If you disclose an issue before they find it, trust (and patience) jumps. If they find one you glossed over, they're gone.

intro: A couple who arrive with printouts. They've already seen every listing online, including two that sold last year.
